pattern.imageEvidence: mobile service action at the customer location
pattern.styleContract: Glossy and mobile-first with paint-safe package proof, driveway detailing evidence, electric action accents, and a thumb-ready bottom bar as the signature move.

tagline: Driveway detailing with a showroom-level finish.

hero.title: ShineShift mobile auto detailing hero image
hero.alt: A mobile auto detailer washing a glossy dark blue car in a residential driveway with detailing equipment and van nearby.

contact.serviceArea: Driveway and garage-friendly mobile detailing for daily drivers, commuter cars, SUVs, trucks, and weekend cars across the central metro and nearby suburbs

copy.eyebrow: Mobile detail packages that come to you
copy.heroText: ShineShift brings foam, filtration, careful towels, interior tools, and a clean finish routine to your home or office without turning the curb into chaos.
copy.introTitle: The detail stays tidy before the shine shows up.
copy.introText: We plan water access, shade, vehicle condition, pet hair, kid-seat crumbs, and paint-safe wash steps before the first mitt touches the car.
copy.proofTitle: Proof you can see before you pull away
copy.quoteTitle: Ready for the driveway detail bay?
copy.quoteText: Request a quote with vehicle type, address, preferred window, and a few photos of the interior and paint. We will match the right package and confirm what to move before arrival.

services.title: Express Exterior
services.text: Foam wash, hand contact wash, wheel faces, tires dressed, glass cleaned, and a gloss boost for cars that need a crisp reset.

services.title: Interior Reset
services.text: Vacuuming, mats, dust, cupholders, door pockets, glass, light stain attention, and dashboard care without the chemical fog.

services.title: Full Driveway Detail
services.text: Exterior wash, interior reset, wheels, trim, glass, protection topper, and a handoff walkaround before the kit rolls away.

process.title: Send quick photos
process.text: A few exterior and interior photos help us spot pet hair, brake dust, sap, stains, and the right package before quote time.

process.title: Prep the spot
process.text: We confirm water access, shade, parking angle, and anything that should come out of the car before the appointment.

process.title: Detail and hand off
process.text: We work panel by panel, keep towels organized, clean up the driveway, and walk you through care notes at the end.

mobile appointments with a clean setup
package match before we roll out

brandBrief.accentBehavior: sun stays reserved for Get quote, active proof cues, and key booking moments.
brandBrief.imageProof: mobile service action at the customer location.
brandBrief.avoidLookingLike: Avoid a generic fixed-bottom-action recolor; do not repeat stock hero framing, copied card rhythm, or vague local-service claims.

serviceDetails.turnaround: 2 bucket: paint-safe wash routine for contact work.
serviceDetails.whatToSend: Share the date, guest count, venue footprint, service window, menu preferences, and host workload you want to avoid.
serviceDetails.prepNote: A few exterior and interior photos help us spot pet hair, brake dust, sap, stains, and the right package before quote time.
serviceDetails.serviceRhythm: Package-board flow for Driveway and garage-friendly mobile detailing for daily drivers, commuter cars, SUVs, trucks, and weekend cars across the central metro and nearby suburbs: compare fit by vehicle size, interior condition, paint needs, access, and arrival window.
serviceDetails.objectionAnswer: For mobile auto detailing service, package fit depends on vehicle size, interior condition, paint sensitivity, driveway access, and weather window, so the detail level matches the actual car.
